case_title: VALDBOLSKAIA, RENATA vs. KIRK, JAMES ALLEN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALDBOLSKAIA, RENATA AS TO DEFENDANT KIRK, JAMES ALLEN KIRK, AUDREY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-16-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-16-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-27-1996

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-15-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $150.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-15-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER CCP 575.2: AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT. FAILURE TO APPEAR AND/OR NO GOOD CAUSE WILL RESULT IN DISMISSAL., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-10-1996 CONTINUED FROM OCT-15-1996 TO NOV-14-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-16-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-16-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR OCT-15-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
